title: Sortie Day
overview: Shigure finds herself assigned to the 1st Striking Force 3rd Division for an important upcoming operation along with a surprising variety of other Fleet Girls. What will their role in the next big offensive against the Abyssals be?

title: Into the Strait
overview: The Fleet Girls of 1st Striking Force 3rd Division head into the Surigao Strait, and begin to engage the Abyssals in combat.

title: Night Battle in the Strait
overview: Yamashiro and her fleet face off against the Abyssals at night in the Surigao Strait.

title: Sasebo
overview: Shigure takes a short break before the next stage of the war begins.

title: Torpedo Squadron 2
overview: Torpedo Squadron 2 does a large-scale training exercise to prepare for the next big battle.

title: Dark Clouds
overview: Shigure is sent on a dangerous undermanned escort mission with her old comrade, Ryuuhou.

title: Naval Interception Mission
overview: A prelude to the final battle of the war is about to begin.

title: See You Again on Another Quiet Blue Sea
overview: The enemy is approaching, and all the allied forces throw themselves heart and soul into the last battle.
